languages.text: {n}Спустя несколько секунд вы осознаете интересную деталь: врата кажутся нетронутыми временем — в отличие от всех окружающих руин.{/n}
{n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Спустя несколько секунд вы осознаете интересную деталь: врата кажутся нетронутыми временем — в отличие от всех окружающих руин.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}
{n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}
{n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数秒後、興味深いことに気づきます。この門は、周囲の遺跡とは異なり、時間の経過を感じさせません。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 数秒後、興味深いことに気づきます。この門は、周囲の遺跡とは異なり、時間の経過を感じさせません。

languages.text: {n}Al cabo de unos segundos, te das cuenta de un detalle interesante: el tiempo parece no haber tocado la puerta, a diferencia del resto de las ruinas que la rodean.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Al cabo de unos segundos, te das cuenta de un detalle interesante: el tiempo parece no haber tocado la puerta, a diferencia del resto de las ruinas que la rodean.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nach einigen Sekunden fällt dir ein interessantes Detail auf. Das Tor scheint von der Zeit verschont geblieben zu sein ... ganz im Gegensatz zu den Ruinen, die es umgeben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einigen Sekunden fällt dir ein interessantes Detail auf. Das Tor scheint von der Zeit verschont geblieben zu sein ... ganz im Gegensatz zu den Ruinen, die es umgeben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Au bout de quelques secondes, vous remarquez un détail intéressant : le portail semble avoir été totalement épargné par le passage du temps, contrairement aux ruines alentour.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Au bout de quelques secondes, vous remarquez un détail intéressant : le portail semble avoir été totalement épargné par le passage du temps, contrairement aux ruines alentour.{/n}

languages.text: {n}几秒后，你注意到了一个耐人寻味的细节：这扇大门似乎完全未曾受到时间的侵蚀——与周遭的废墟形成了鲜明对比。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}几秒后，你注意到了一个耐人寻味的细节：这扇大门似乎完全未曾受到时间的侵蚀——与周遭的废墟形成了鲜明对比。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra ilginç bir detayın farkına varıyorsun: Etrafındaki harabelerin aksine kapı, zamanın geçişinden hiç etkilenmemiş gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra ilginç bir detayın farkına varıyorsun: Etrafındaki harabelerin aksine kapı, zamanın geçişinden hiç etkilenmemiş gibi görünüyor.{/n}
